name: Gores Holdings X, Inc. / CI
summary: Gores Holdings X, Inc. is a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on June 26, 2023, formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, acquisition, or business combination. It completed its initial public offering on May 5, 2025. The company is affiliated with The Gores Group LLC and sponsored by Gores Sponsor X LLC, an affiliate of Chairman Alec E. Gores.
